steps.title: Combine and match
steps.content: Add the constants: $-190+228=38$, giving $y=95x+38$. That confirms C is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above confirms C, $y = 95x + 38$. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so C is correct.
